WARNING: This data is ONLY for CSE and CS branch. Student selects ONE elective.

professional_elective_1.note: Student must choose ONE of the following 6 electives

electives.elective_track: Full Stack Product Engineering with AI (Powered by Xebia)

units.title: Foundations of React ES6
topics: Features of React, React architecture and mental model
How React Works, Leveraging Virtual DOM
Setting up React, Array & object methods

units.title: JSX
topics: Why JSX, Embedding JavaScript, Expression in JSX
Nested elements, JSX Attributes, JSX Comments
JSX Styling, The State of the Component
Defining State, Changing the State, Props, Validation

units.title: Elements
topics: Rendering Element, Creating React Element, Updating Element
Components: Functional Component, Functional Components as Stateless

units.title: Redux
topics: Component design patterns, Lifting state and prop drilling
Context API for global state
Redux fundamentals: Store, actions, reducers, Data flow
Redux Toolkit (modern Redux), Middleware and async logic (Thunk)
Debugging with Redux DevTools
Testing React components basics

units.title: NextJS
topics: Next.js fundamentals: pages, routing, data fetching (SSR/SSG)
Authentication (JWT, OAuth) and session management
Integrating AI/LLM APIs for intelligent UI features
Analytics, logging, and observability
Deployment using Vercel, Netlify, or AWS Amplify

lab_practicals: JS conditional logic, loops, array manipulations
Async API calls with Redux Toolkit
textbooks: Banks, Porcello - Learning React, O'Reilly Media
Grider - Modern React with Redux, Udemy Press

electives.course_name: Intelligent Systems with Text & Vision API
electives.elective_track: Next-Gen AI: From Models to Agents (Powered by Xebia)
electives.prerequisite: Python Programming, Linear Algebra Basics, Probability Fundamentals

units.title: Natural Language Processing
topics: Introduction to NLP, Types of NLP systems
How computer understands text, NLP Terminologies
Steps in NLP, NLP preprocessing pipeline
NLP Challenges
DevOps: MVP, Application Deployment, ARA, CI/CD

units.title: Words & Vectors
topics: GloVe Word Embeddings, Word2Vec (Skip Gram, CBOW)
Advanced word vectors, Word window classification
Dependency parsing, Constituency parsing
Machine translation, Attention mechanism
RNN for language modelling, Dynamic neural networks

units.title: Introduction to Computer Vision and Image Processing
topics: Image Processing, Elements of Image Processing System
Computer Vision, Application Areas
2D and 3D Transformation, Image Enhancement
Image Segmentation, VR/AR, Object Recognition, Object Tracking

units.title: Introduction to Python OpenCV
topics: OpenCV: GUI Features, Pixel Editing, Geometric Transformations
Feature Detection, Video Analysis and Tracking
Histogram Equalization, Image Denoising, Object Detection
Spatial Filtering, Smoothing & Sharpening Image Filters

units.title: Object Recognition & Tracking
topics: Shape correspondence and matching, Sliding Window Method
Tracking Strategies, Matching, Tracking with Filters
Data Association, Particle Filtering
Stereo Vision, Motion estimation, Structure from motion

lab_practicals: Multimodal dataset preprocessing with spaCy/NLTK and OpenCV
OCR with Tesseract/EasyOCR and text preprocessing
NER and word clouds from image captions
Sentiment analysis using BERT and ResNet/VGG16
Visual Question Answering (VQA) system using Hugging Face
Image captioning with CNN-LSTM, BLEU/ROUGE evaluation
Video object detection and NLP summarization
Handwritten notes OCR and NLP classification
textbooks: Introduction to Natural Language Processing, Jacob Eisenstein, MIT Press
Mastering OpenCV with Python, O'Reilly Media

electives.elective_track: DevOps and Autonomous Engineering (Powered by Xebia)
electives.prerequisite: Programming Fundamentals, Operating Systems Basics, Computer Networks Basics

units.title: Traditional SDLC Models, Problems & Solutions
topics: Software Development Methodologies
Waterfall Model, Classical Waterfall Model
Traditional IT Organizations, Developers vs IT Operations Conflict
Birth of Agile, Four Values of the Agile Manifesto
Agile and Lean

units.title: Linux Basics and Admin
topics: Introduction to Linux, Importance of Linux in DevOps
Linux Basic Command Utilities, Linux Administration
Environment Variables, Networking
Linux Server Installation, RPM and YUM Installation

units.title: Source Code Management & Git Workflows
topics: Centralized vs. distributed SCM systems (SVN vs. Git)
Git internals: commits, branches, merges, rebases
Branching strategies: GitFlow, feature branching, trunk-based dev
Pull requests, code reviews, and merge approvals
Create repositories, manage PRs, resolve merge conflicts

units.title: AI-Assisted Coding & Intelligent SCM
topics: GitHub Copilot / CodeWhisperer basics
AI-based code completion, documentation, and refactoring
Integrating SonarQube + AI for code quality metrics
GitOps introduction: managing infra via Git (FluxCD, ArgoCD)
Build a GitOps pipeline to deploy a sample app

units.title: Security, Compliance & Productivity Analytics
topics: Policy-as-Code using OPA
Snyk AI for pre-commit scans
Secrets management & secure Git workflows
DevEx analytics - tracking productivity and automation ROI
Building dashboards for code quality and release cadence

textbooks: The Linux DevOps Handbook, O'Reilly Media

units.title: Integrated AWS Cloud Foundations
topics: Cloud computing fundamentals, core AWS services
Infrastructure design, security best practices
Cost management, cloud adoption strategies
Infrastructure as Code (IaC)

units.title: Cloud Data Ingestion and Pipeline Design
topics: Data ingestion architectures
Batch, streaming, and event-driven pipelines
Data landing zones, message handling, validation
Fault-tolerant delivery mechanisms

units.title: Data Transformation, Modeling, and Analytics Preparation
topics: Data transformation workflows
Schema management, data cleansing, enrichment
Normalization, aggregation
Modeling approaches for analytical workloads

units.title: Scalable Data Storage and Operational Management
topics: Data storage strategies by workload characteristics
Layered architectures, partitioning, lifecycle policies
Monitoring, throughput optimization, failure detection

units.title: Data Security, Governance, and Compliance Management
topics: Identity-based access controls, encryption strategies
Auditing mechanisms, classification policies
Governance models: accountability, traceability
Confidentiality, integrity, compliance throughout data lifecycle

textbooks: Dua, S. - AWS Certified Data Analytics Study Guide, Wiley
Singh, G. - Data Engineering with AWS, Packt Publishing

content_covered: Introduction to iOS Ecosystem, Xcode Interface, Project Structure
Swift Basics: Syntax, Variables, Data Types
Collections in Swift: Arrays, Dictionaries, Sets
UIKit Essentials: Views, View Controllers, Storyboards
Auto Layout Basics: Constraints, Adaptive UI
Mini App Project: Calculator / Notes / Gallery
textbooks: Develop in Swift (Official Apple Books) - Apple's official series
Swift Apprentice (Kodeco) - foundational book on Swift language

units.title: Introduction to Cloud Computing and Azure
topics: Evolution of Cloud Computing
Cloud Service Models: IaaS, PaaS, SaaS
Cloud Deployment Models: Public, Private, Hybrid
Overview of Microsoft Azure
Azure Global Infrastructure (Regions, Availability Zones)
Azure Portal, Azure CLI, Azure Resource Manager (ARM)

units.title: Core Azure Services: Compute, Storage & Networking
topics: Azure Compute: Virtual Machines, App Services, Azure Functions
Azure Storage: Blob Storage, File Storage, Queue and Table Storage
Azure Networking: Virtual Networks, Load Balancer, VPN Gateway

units.title: Azure Data Services for Data Engineering
topics: Azure SQL Database, Azure Cosmos DB
Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse Analytics
Azure Data Lake Storage
Basic Data Engineering use cases on Azure

units.title: Security, Identity, and Governance in Azure
topics: Azure Security Fundamentals, Azure Active Directory
Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
Azure Policies and Blueprints
Azure Monitor and Log Analytics
Compliance and Trust in Azure

units.title: Azure Pricing, SLA, and Cloud Management
topics: Azure Pricing Models, Cost Management and Billing
Azure Service Level Agreements (SLAs)
Azure Support Plans
Resource Optimization and Best Practices
Overview of AZ-900 Certification Exam Pattern

textbooks: Exam Ref AZ-900: Microsoft Azure Fundamentals, Jim Cheshire, Microsoft Press
Learning Microsoft Azure: Cloud Computing and Development Fundamentals, Andersson, Carrio, O'Reilly
